요한복음 17:1.content: Jesus said these things, then lifting up his eyes to heaven, he said, “Father, the time has come. Glorify your Son, that your Son may also glorify you;

요한복음 17:2.content: even as you gave him authority over all flesh, so he will give eternal life to all whom you have given him.

요한복음 17:3.content: This is eternal life, that they should know you, the only true God, and him whom you sent, Jesus Christ.

요한복음 17:4.content: I glorified you on the earth. I have accomplished the work which you have given me to do.

요한복음 17:5.content: Now, Father, glorify me with your own self with the glory which I had with you before the world existed.

요한복음 17:6.content: I revealed your name to the people whom you have given me out of the world. They were yours, and you have given them to me. They have kept your word.

요한복음 17:7.content: Now they have known that all things whatever you have given me are from you,

요한복음 17:8.content: for the words which you have given me I have given to them, and they received them, and knew for sure that I came from you. They have believed that you sent me.

요한복음 17:9.content: I pray for them. I don’t pray for the world, but for those whom you have given me, for they are yours.

요한복음 17:10.content: All things that are mine are yours, and yours are mine, and I am glorified in them.

요한복음 17:11.content: I am no more in the world, but these are in the world, and I am coming to you. Holy Father, keep them through your name which you have given me, that they may be one, even as we are.

요한복음 17:12.content: While I was with them in the world, I kept them in your name. I have kept those whom you have given me. None of them is lost except the son of destruction, that the Scripture might be fulfilled.

요한복음 17:13.content: But now I come to you, and I say these things in the world, that they may have my joy made full in themselves.

요한복음 17:14.content: I have given them your word. The world hated them, because they are not of the world, even as I am not of the world.

요한복음 17:15.content: I pray not that you would take them from the world, but that you would keep them from the evil one.

요한복음 17:16.content: They are not of the world even as I am not of the world.

요한복음 17:17.content: Sanctify them in your truth. Your word is truth.

요한복음 17:18.content: As you sent me into the world, even so I have sent them into the world.

요한복음 17:19.content: For their sakes I sanctify myself, that they themselves also may be sanctified in truth.

요한복음 17:20.content: Not for these only do I pray, but for those also who will believe in me through their word,

요한복음 17:21.content: that they may all be one; even as you, Father, are in me, and I in you, that they also may be one in us; that the world may believe that you sent me.

요한복음 17:22.content: The glory which you have given me, I have given to them; that they may be one, even as we are one;

요한복음 17:23.content: I in them, and you in me, that they may be perfected into one; that the world may know that you sent me and loved them, even as you loved me.

요한복음 17:24.content: Father, I desire that they also whom you have given me be with me where I am, that they may see my glory, which you have given me, for you loved me before the foundation of the world.

요한복음 17:25.content: Righteous Father, the world hasn’t known you, but I knew you; and these knew that you sent me.

요한복음 17:26.content: I made known to them your name, and will make it known; that the love with which you loved me may be in them, and I in them.”
